svg.text: 8-Input x 4-Bit Weight MAC | StrongARM Comparator | 3-Phase Clock u2014 SKY130A | 1.8 V
~702 transistors | ~260 MIM caps | 10/10 specs PASS in ngspice-42 | 0.08 LSB linearity | 99.5% MC accuracy | < 1 nW @ 10 Hz
x32 cells/MAC x4 MACs = 128 cells, ~702 transistors total
NAND-based | clk_in u2192 phi_s, phi_e, phi_r with dead time
Delay Chain (4 slow inverters u2248 1.2 ns)
